zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：[震荡整理，关注关键支撑与阻力]
zh.content:
当前SOL/USD的价格表现呈现震荡整理的趋势。价格在85.63至86.29区间内波动，显示出市场暂时缺乏明确方向。短期内，价格可能继续在这个区间内震荡，等待进一步的技术信号确认。

从技术指标来看，MACD目前为负值（-0.492），虽然信号线数据缺失，但负值表明短期内可能仍有卖压，暂时不支持强势上涨。而SMA(20)为86.51，价格略低于这一均线，意味着短期内存在一定的下行压力。

支撑位方面，85.63是一个关键区域，若价格跌破此位，可能会进一步下探至更低支撑区间。上行阻力位在86.29附近，一旦突破此位置，可能会迎来短期反弹，但还需关注MACD和RSI等指标的进一步确认。

对于交易者而言，建议密切关注价格是否突破关键支撑或阻力。若突破支撑，可考虑适当减仓或做空，而突破阻力则可适当看涨。但需谨慎操作，避免过度追高或杀跌。

The broader structure remains mildly bearish, as price trades slightly below the 20-day SMA (86.51), indicating short-term weakness. At the same time, recent behavior suggests stabilization after prior downside pressure, with buyers defending the mid-80s zone and forming a tentative base.

> The Solana Price Prediction for March 2026 suggests a cautiously bullish outlook, with analysts targeting a potential move toward the $95–105 range if momentum strengthens. At the time of analysis, Solana (SOL) is trading around the low $80s, showing early signs of recovery after recent downside pressure.
  

From a trading perspective, the current setup favors a cautious, range-bound approach. Short-term traders may look for mean-reversion trades between support and resistance, while breakout traders should wait for a confirmed close above 87 before considering long positions. Conversely, failure to hold above 85 could justify defensive or short-biased strategies. Overall, patience is warranted, as the market appears to be transitioning rather than trending decisively.
